summary: Phase 1 extract gate correctly blocks Pepino bare-exact cost sync in code and unit tests when VITE_MATCH_LIFECYCLE_EXTRACT_GATE is enabled (default). Latest live Bidfood re-read (2026-06-14T10:39Z) still updated ingredients.current_price for Pepino conserva — gate not active in the running build. Existing poison row a689bd91 persists; ungated bypass paths remain (flag off, backfill, intentional manual confirm/correct).

1_sync_executed_on_latest_reread.evidence: ingredients.updated_at 2026-06-14T10:39:06Z aligns with invoice_items re-insert 2026-06-14T10:39:05Z; current_price changed to Pepino-fresh values (1.77, qty 1000)

2_isExtractCostSyncAuthorizedMatch.evidence: query-raw.json live_match; unit test matcher output for PEPINO→PEPINO CONSERVA

3_logExtractCostGateSkipped.evidence: vitest stdout emits [match-lifecycle-extract-gate] action:skipped for PEPINO exact; no server log store

4_persistOperationalIngredientCostFromIn.evidence: persistSpy not called in gate test; live DB current_price updated at re-read timestamp

5_appendIngredientPriceHistoryFromInvoic.evidence: gate test blocks before persist; live history count still 3, a689bd91 unchanged

6_ingredient_price_history_modified.evidence: 3 rows unchanged; a689bd91 new_price still 0.00177, created_at 2026-05-25T12:00:00Z
